description: Reflect on the past year's achievements with our comprehensive annual report template, specifically designed for architecture firms. This internal newsletter highlights your firm's goals, progress, and overall company overview, making it perfect for non-profit organizations and corporate entities alike. It offers a detailed analysis of your human resources department, allowing you to gauge your team's performance and plan for the future. Our template seamlessly combines professionalism with user-friendly design to give you an engaging year in review. As we step into the New Year, make use of this annual review tool to inspire your team and set the stage for upcoming projects. Ideal for any architecture firm seeking to enhance their internal communications, this template is a must-have for your annual review process.
short_description: Reflect on your architecture firm's yearly achievements with our engaging annual report template. Perfect for non-profit and corporate entities, it offers a detailed company overview and HR analysis. Inspire your team for the New Year with this must-have annual review tool.

designer.description: I spend my days crafting gorgeous graphics. I work mainly with small local businesses. I’ve just spent 2 years living in Sweden. I moved back to Russia in October 2015 and am now settled in Moskow. I’m constantly learning design related topics, currently playing around a lot with flyer design for clubs and pubs.
